permissions.description: Read CMS site metadata and site-level management lists.
permissions.implementationStatus: Enforce tenant, organization, and site visibility before returning site metadata. - Implemented.

permissions.description: Create, update, and soft-delete CMS sites.
permissions.implementationStatus: Require site administration permission and write cms_audit_log on every mutation. - Implemented.

permissions.description: Read publishing channels for a CMS site.
permissions.implementationStatus: Filter channels by tenant, organization, and site membership. - Implemented.

permissions.description: Create, update, and delete CMS publishing channels.
permissions.implementationStatus: Validate site ownership and enforce channel code uniqueness per site. - Implemented.

permissions.description: Read content type definitions and field schemas.
permissions.implementationStatus: Return only active, site-scoped schemas visible to the caller. - Implemented.

permissions.description: Manage content type and content field schemas.
permissions.implementationStatus: Validate schema evolution compatibility before mutating type or field definitions. - Implemented.

permissions.description: Read taxonomies and taxonomy terms.
permissions.implementationStatus: Filter taxonomy trees by tenant, organization, site, and deleted status. - Implemented.

permissions.description: Create, update, and delete taxonomy structures.
permissions.implementationStatus: Recalculate taxonomy term paths and audit tree mutations in one transaction. - Implemented.

permissions.description: Read draft and management views of CMS entries.
permissions.implementationStatus: Apply site/channel/status filters and hide unpublished fields when caller lacks review scope. - Implemented.

permissions.description: Create CMS entries.
permissions.implementationStatus: Validate content type, channel, author identity, and idempotency before insert. - Implemented.

permissions.description: Update CMS entry metadata, body, field values, media, and terms.
permissions.implementationStatus: Enforce optimistic version checks and write entry versions on content-changing updates. - Implemented.

permissions.description: Soft-delete CMS entries.
permissions.implementationStatus: Soft-delete entry aggregates and emit cache/search invalidation through outbox. - Implemented.

permissions.description: Publish, unpublish, or schedule CMS entries.
permissions.implementationStatus: Create cms_publish_snapshot, update entry state, and enqueue integration events atomically. - Implemented.

permissions.description: Rollback CMS entries to a previous version.
permissions.implementationStatus: Validate target version, restore body/fields/terms, and record rollback audit. - Implemented.

permissions.description: Read CMS page management views.
permissions.implementationStatus: Filter pages by tenant, organization, site, route path, and publish state. - Implemented.

permissions.description: Create, update, delete, and compose CMS pages.
permissions.implementationStatus: Validate page route uniqueness and block schema compatibility before writes. - Implemented.

permissions.description: Publish CMS pages.
permissions.implementationStatus: Render page snapshot, update publish state, and enqueue sitemap/cache events atomically. - Implemented.

permissions.description: Read CMS feed definitions, rules, curated items, and snapshots.
permissions.implementationStatus: Return feed views scoped by site, channel, locale, and caller permissions. - Implemented.

permissions.description: Manage feed definitions, rules, and curated items.
permissions.implementationStatus: Validate feed mode, rule compatibility, and curated item ordering before writes. - Implemented.

permissions.description: Publish feed snapshots for delivery.
permissions.implementationStatus: Compose feed snapshot and enqueue RSS/cache/search projection events atomically. - Implemented.

permissions.description: Read CMS audit and outbox diagnostic records.
permissions.implementationStatus: Restrict audit queries to authorized tenant and organization scopes. - Implemented.

permissions.description: Retry CMS outbox events and operational audit actions.
permissions.implementationStatus: Validate retry eligibility and append audit records for operator-triggered retries. - Implemented.
